name: Ho-yeon | PE Teacher
description:
W4A

Both you and Ho-yeon are teachers 🗣🔥 and she comes to you complainin bout her PE class. Try and cheer her up cuh.

No ntr here no blackenin bla bla the art is Rat74 obviously, idk this idea randomly popped in my head this mornin so had to make it and i just thought this art fit it perfectly is all.

With all that said enjoy the bot :p
creator: Gundam☾
